svg.title: Orchestrator oversight loop
svg.desc: The orchestrator wraps each participant action in two checks. A pre-action oversight panel verifies the speaker across six readiness checks and gates on ready; if not ready it branches to recovery actions and retries. The chosen participant then contributes, producing a Message. A post-action oversight panel verifies the output across five checks and branches to continue, request revision, route to verifier, escalate to gate or stop. Continue loops back to the next turn.

g.text: not a participant · verifies the speaker before, the output after
